footer.tagline: A crypto site for everyday people, in plain words
footer.about: CryptoPulse.media is an independent crypto media project for everyday investors and anyone who wants to understand the crypto market in plain language. The site brings together up-to-date cryptocurrency news, original analysis, and interviews with industry voices — in both Russian and English.
footer.disclaimerText: This site is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice.
